'''Nibber Swoo''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rybet/Legends|Rybet]].

==Biography==
The early life of professional [[Air taxi/Legends|cabbie]] '''Nibber Swoo''' was a mystery. He was licensed by the government of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] to travel outside the magnetic traffic-lines of the city-planet. Zooming through the city canyons in his red, open-topped [[Barkhetta]], he had an uncanny habit of pulling up whenever someone needed a lift. Of course, if he had to evade [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]]-toting pursuers, he would charge double, though often looking back over his shoulder to take a pot-shot with his trusty [[Hold-out blaster/Legends|hold-out blaster]].<ref name="CatCW" />

His cousin worked for a [[Wikipedia:funeral home|funeral home]], where he operated an [[Wikipedia:Tissue digestion|organic disintegrator]]. After-hours, he did a roaring trade disposing of bodies for shady figures in the local underworld. As such, Nibber Swoo was often a source for secondhand information about local criminal activity.<ref name="CatCW" />

Nibber Swoo's 'interpretations' of skylane regulations frequently put him at loggerheads with [[Coruscant Security Force/Legends|Coruscant Security Force]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Ia]], who considered Swoo her professional nemesis.<ref name="CatCW" />

==Personality and traits==
High-strung and irritable, Swoo would launch into a spittle-flying fury whenever he was cut off by a cargo hauler or pulled over by Coruscant Security for a speeding violation.<ref name="CatCW" />
